Description: Contract preliminaries: Provide all preliminaries necessary for the proper execution of the works including management, supervision, temporary works, welfare, services, security, insurances, and statutory compliance for a 24‑week programme.
Notes:
* Based on mid‑market UK preliminaries norms for small residential projects
* Includes fixed and time‑related preliminaries
* Assumes 24‑week programme
* Includes insurances, H&S compliance, and statutory notifications
* NRM2 compliant description

Description: Site establishment: Mobilisation to site including delivery, installation, and commissioning of temporary accommodation, storage, and welfare facilities.
Notes:
* Includes delivery and setup of welfare cabin and storage
* Based on typical hire and delivery rates
* Includes initial power connection
* NRM2 1.2.1 measurement basis

Description: Temporary accommodation: Welfare cabin (canteen, drying room, WC) for duration of works.
Notes:
* Based on weekly hire of standard welfare cabin
* Includes cleaning and consumables
* Assumes 24‑week programme
* Mid‑market UK hire rates

Description: Temporary storage: Secure lockable container for tools and materials.
Notes:
* Standard 20ft container hire
* Includes delivery and collection
* Assumes 24‑week programme
* Mid‑market UK rates

Description: Temporary services: Provide temporary electrical supply including distribution boards, cabling, and testing.
Notes:
* Includes temporary power setup
* Excludes utility provider charges
* Includes testing and certification
* NRM2 compliant

Description: Temporary water supply including standpipe, hose runs, and isolation.
Notes:
* Includes temporary water connection
* Excludes water authority fees
* Includes fittings and hoses
* Mid‑market UK rates

Description: Temporary lighting to work areas and access routes.
Notes:
* Includes LED task lighting
* Includes installation and removal
* Assumes 24‑week programme
* NRM2 1.3.3

Description: Site security: Temporary fencing to site perimeter (Heritage mesh or Heras panels).
Notes:
* Includes delivery, erection, and removal
* 60m assumed perimeter for 3‑bed detached plot
* Includes stabilisers and feet
* Mid‑market UK rates

Description: Site access gate including lockable panel.
Notes:
* Includes lockable gate panel
* Includes installation and removal
* NRM2 compliant

Description: Weekly security inspections.
Notes:
* Weekly site checks
* Assumes unoccupied site outside working hours
* Mid‑market UK rates

Description: Health & Safety: Provide all H&S documentation including CPP, RAMS, inductions, and ongoing compliance.
Notes:
* Includes preparation and maintenance of H&S documentation
* Includes site inductions
* Includes statutory compliance
* NRM2 1.5.1

Description: First aid equipment and maintenance.
Notes:
* Includes first aid kits and replenishment
* Assumes 24‑week programme
* Mid‑market UK rates

Description: Site management: Full‑time working foreman/site manager for duration of works.
Notes:
* Based on mid‑market UK foreman rate
* Assumes full‑time presence
* 24‑week programme
* Labour only

Description: Weekly site meetings including minute preparation.
Notes:
* Includes preparation of minutes
* Includes attendance and reporting
* Mid‑market UK rates

Description: Scaffolding: Independent scaffold to front and rear elevations for brickwork and roof works.
Notes:
* Includes erection, hire, and dismantling
* 120m² assumed for two elevations
* Includes handrails and toe boards
* Mid‑market UK scaffold rates

Description: Access tower for internal works.
Notes:
* Includes hire and delivery
* Assumes 6‑week usage
* Mid‑market UK rates

Description: Temporary protection: Protect existing surfaces, pavements, and adjacent properties.
Notes:
* Includes sheeting and barriers
* Includes installation and removal
* NRM2 compliant

Description: Temporary signage including safety boards and directional signage.
Notes:
* Includes statutory signage
* Includes installation and removal
* Mid‑market UK rates

Description: Skip hire: 8‑yard skips for mixed construction waste.
Notes:
* Assumes 10 skips over 24 weeks
* Includes delivery and collection
* Includes landfill charges
* Mid‑market UK rates

Description: General waste management including segregation and recycling.
Notes:
* Includes labour for segregation
* Includes recycling compliance
* Assumes 24‑week programme
* NRM2 compliant

Description: Final demobilisation: Removal of temporary works, welfare, fencing, and services.
Notes:
* Includes removal and site clearance
* Includes reinstatement of disturbed areas
* Mid‑market UK rates
* NRM2 compliant

Description: Preliminaries total (calculated).
Notes:
* Total will be calculated automatically in QSCostingPro
* Sum of all preliminaries above
* NRM2 compliant
